title: Why Tapestry (TPR) is Poised to Beat Earnings Estimates Again
text: Tapestry (TPR) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

title: Tapestry's Got One Strong Brand, Not Three
text: Tapestry muddled through the 2020 pandemic as best it could. First-quarter 2022 results show the retailer's not out of the woods yet.

title: Should You Buy Tapestry's Stock?
text: Tapestry reported its Q1 report, wherein revenues were slightly higher and earnings were 7% above the Trefis estimates. title: 4 S&P 500 Retail Stocks That Appear Solid Bets for 2022
text: A favorable economic backdrop bodes well for the Retail Sector. Tapestry (TPR), Ulta Beauty (ULTA), Target (TGT) and Costco (COST) look well poised to tap the opportunities.

title: Top 3 retail stocks to buy in January 2022
text: Stocks have started the year well, with the S&P 500 index rising to a record high. Retailers have continued to perform well as the market reflects on the strong holiday season.
